name: Walnut and Roquefort Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Head romaine, cleaned, torn into large pieces
1/2 Head chicory, cleaned, torn into large pieces
1 Avocado, peeled, pitted, sliced lengthwise, dipped in lemon juice
1 Bunch scallions with tops, trimmed, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast walnuts in a heavy skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently until golden, about 5 to 8 minutes. Remove from the skillet and cool.
2. In a small bowl, mix vinegar, freshly ground pepper, and salt. Gradually add oil in a thin, steady stream while whisking continuously until the dressing is smooth and thoroughly mixed.
3. Combine romaine, chicory, avocado, scallions, cheese, and cooled walnuts in a large salad bowl. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss. Taste and adjust seasonings if needed. Serve immediately.
